article_title: Precision BioSciences Wins FDA Fast Track for First Gene-Editing Therapy Targeting Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy, Prepares to Dose Children in Phase 1/2 Trial

content_preview.title: Precision BioSciences Wins FDA Fast Track for First Gene-Editing Therapy Targeting Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy, Prepares to Dose Children in Phase 1/2 Trial
content_preview.summary: Precision BioSciences receives FDA Fast Track for PBGENE-DMD, a gene-editing therapy that excises faulty exons to restore near full-length dystrophin in up to 60 percent of Duchenne patients.
content_preview.body_excerpt: Precision BioSciences announced on March 9 that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration has granted Fast Track designation to [PBGENE-DMD](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260309307306/en/Precision-BioSciences-Receives-FDA-Fast-Track-Designation-for-PBGENE-DMD-and-Announces-Duchenne-Muscular-Dystrophy-Investor-Event), an investigational gene-editing therapy for Duchenne muscular dystrophy. The designation, which expedites regulatory review for drugs that address serious conditions with unm...

editor_notes.source_verification: FDA.gov confirmed Elevidys approval for Duchenne (June 2024). Precision BioSciences investor page confirmed all preclinical data: 50-65% CK reduction, 81-84% maximal force, 89-92% tetanic force, 9-month durability. BusinessWire returned 403 (bot blocked) but is an authoritative press release wire.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Key claims verified: FDA Fast Track designation for PBGENE-DMD, exon 45-55 excision strategy covering ~60% of Duchenne patients, 9-month preclinical durability data, FUNCTION-DMD trial details. All figures match source data exactly.
editor_notes.editorial_quality: Thorough News article at 799 words. Title slightly long (156 chars vs 150 recommended) but acceptable for subject complexity. Excellent technical detail balanced with accessibility. Competitive landscape section provides important context.
editor_notes.verdict_rationale: APPROVE. All substantive scientific claims verified against primary sources. Title length warning is minor (6 chars over). Article provides rigorous, well-sourced coverage of a significant gene therapy development.
